MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Justin A. Goodman, Esq. of Beckman Blair, Tel. 415.255.5966, for defendant and moving party;
David T. Chapman, Esq. of the Law Office of David T. Chapman, Tel. 415.613.9483, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TEIKO SHIMADA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled as to causes of action 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 7, and 8 and sustained with leave to amend as to cause of action 6. Order signed in open court. (See order for details of the ruling.) Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
